slides.title: The Compliance Challenge at Acme Corp
talking_points: Manual compliance reporting consumes 40+ hours per quarter across teams
Scattered internal docs create inconsistency in audit preparation

slides.title: AI-Powered Compliance Search
talking_points: Credal Search enables natural language queries across all compliance documents
Results are grounded in source documents with full citation trails
Role-based access controls ensure only authorized users see sensitive data

slides.title: Automated Report Generation
talking_points: Generate compliance reports directly from indexed knowledge base
Templates ensure consistent formatting across regulatory submissions

slides.title: Enterprise Security & Data Governance
talking_points: SOC 2 Type II certified with end-to-end encryption
Data never leaves your VPC with on-premise deployment option
Full audit logging for regulatory compliance

slides.title: Salesforce & Confluence Integration
talking_points: Native Salesforce connector syncs account data bidirectionally
Confluence spaces are automatically indexed and kept up to date

slides.title: Addressing Data Security Concerns
talking_points: All data encrypted at rest and in transit with customer-managed keys
No model training on customer data — strict data isolation guarantees

slides.title: Implementation Timeline & Next Steps
talking_points: Typical deployment completed in 2-4 weeks with dedicated solutions engineer
Pilot program available with limited scope to prove ROI before full rollout
